case_title: SARA E GEORGE ET AL VS. LESLIE GURVITCH

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GURVITCH, LESLIE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2021 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED "AD, C19, 1023" SERVED NOV-17-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GURVITCH, LESLIE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEORGE, SARA E RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GURVITCH, LESLIE $700.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $765.00, BALANCE OF SECURITY DEPOSIT LESS CLEANING FEES ($150.00) AND DESTROYING COMMUNITY PANTRY. **(PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 3-2-21)** STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-03-2021 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY GEORGE, SARA E DIXIT, ARRAY AS TO DEFENDANT GURVITCH, LESLIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEORGE, SARA E AS TO DEFENDANT GURVITCH, LESLIE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-02-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-02-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF SARA E. GEORGE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LESLIE GURVITCH IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
